characters.name: Giant Four-Armed Six-Eyed Hoohawsasaurus
characters.description: The Giant Four-Armed Six-Eyed Hoohawsasaurus is a minor character who only appeared in the episodeThe Thing That Almost Ate Hoohaw. It was first spotted by Mayor Jeff while fishing on his boat. Throughout the episode, the kids imagined what their favourite superheroes would do to battle the sea monster. Following a Noodle Dance, Jelly got a closer look to find a splinter on its tail, so the kids help him. At the end of the episode, after Flick does a cannonball, the sea monster also does a cannonball, and as the screen irises out, the sea monster winks at the viewer.

characters.name: Mr. Beaver
characters.description: Mr. BeaverisMunchy’s dad. He’s mentioned in a number of episodes as living somewhere else, suggesting he andMrs. Beaverare divorced. He also may be deceased or in the military. Sadly, the show was canceled (most likely per Disney’s 65-episode policy) before he ever got to make an appearance.

characters.name: Mr. Duck
characters.description: Mr. Duckis the presumed father ofFlick. His existence has only been confirmed through the fact that Flick's mom is calledMrs. Duckby the characters. Also, a picture of someone is seen on Mrs. Duck’s nightstand in “The Duck Who Cried Bear”, who might be Flick or his father. It’s speculated by fans that Flick’s father is deceased (likeMr. Beaver). However unlikeMr. Beaver, he’s never been directly referenced.
